channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: KaichenCurry/TabNexus
item.description: Turn tab overload into a local-first workspace with intent-first AI organization and Agent collaboration through MCP. — ⭐28, TypeScript

item.title: erayendes/app-store-connect-mcp
item.description: Heimdall — MCP server for the Apple App Store Connect API & App Store Server API (StoreKit 2). 982 tools generated from Apple's official OpenAPI spec. Client-agnostic: Claude, Codex, Cursor, and any M — ⭐22, TypeScript

item.title: TengByte/mcpgrade
item.description: Lighthouse for MCP servers — score any MCP server on agent usability, not just spec compliance — ⭐17, TypeScript

item.title: 0xkillaflow/agama-redmine-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Redmine. Enables AI agents to work with issues using simple natural language commands. — ⭐16, TypeScript

item.title: obundh/korea-public-data-catalog-mcp
item.description: 대한민국 공공데이터를 조합해 서비스 아이디어를 설계하는 정적 메타데이터 MCP 공개 베타 — ⭐13, TypeScript

item.title: anshupriyan/cli-bridge
item.description: MCP server for Claude Desktop and other Model Context Protocol clients — sandboxed filesystem access (read/write/edit/search) plus Dev Mode-gated shell command execution, scoped to a single workspace — ⭐12, TypeScript

item.title: do-md/homekb
item.description: Local-first personal Markdown knowledge base with semantic search, AI Q&A, MCP, desktop/web clients, and a self-hostable zero-data-at-rest relay. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: HossamYoussof/opencode-config
item.description: Personal OpenCode configuration with MCP servers, agent presets, and cross-platform installer — ⭐5, Shell

item.title: Nero0225/ax-platform-mcp
item.description: aX — agent-native collaboration network for long-running agents. Remote MCP server: messaging, tasks, shared context, search, MCP Apps. — ⭐5, HTML

item.title: sillogic/sill-ensoul
item.description: Long-term memory for CLI agents — cross-CLI, cross-project, cross-session. OKF Wiki + MCP server, model-agnostic. — ⭐5, Python

item.title: pioner92/symbolpeek-mcp
item.description: Ask for the symbol, not the file. Token-efficient MCP server giving AI coding agents symbol-level reads of TS/JS, Rust, Python, Java, Go, JSON, and Markdown — ⭐4, Rust

item.title: rdtan/architecture-discovery-mcp
item.description: Auto-discover enterprise architecture artifacts (TOGAF AA series) from Java/Maven source code via MCP Server. Scan once, get Excel + PPTX in seconds. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: hongnoul/hwatu
item.description: Visual verification browser for AI coding agents: daemon-based WebKitGTK, real rendering, ~13ms window spawn — ⭐4, Rust

item.title: csm101/delphi-visual-studio-code-debugger
item.description: A debugger for delphi in visual studio code, and also a MCP server to give claude/copilot/etc authonomous delphi debugging capabilities — ⭐3, Pascal

item.title: Bobbeori/bobbeori-mcp-server
item.description: MCP server for Bobbeori, connecting ChatGPT, Codex, Claude, and external agents to fridge inventory, recipes, shopping, receipts, and calendar tools with OAuth and preview-first write actions. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: PanYouFu/akshare-mcp
item.description: A股数据 MCP Server — 双源融合，零C依赖，14个工具 — ⭐3, Python

item.title: cmer/mcp-switchboard
item.description: Self-hosted MCP gateway for coding agents — one place for all your MCP servers, one endpoint per agent, per-agent tool switchboard with OAuth handled for you. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: sai-chaithanya-navuluri/content-core
item.description: production AI platform kernel: LLM abstraction, workflow engine, RAG, MCP server, FastAPI, evaluation framework, closed-loop feedback — ⭐3, Python

item.title: aradar46/reuse-before-generate
item.description: Stop your AI agent from rebuilding what already exists. An opinionated MCP server that checks GitHub, npm and Python repos for maintained alternatives before you scaffold. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: HoziMurayama/Multi-LLM-Debugging-Bridge
item.description: An MCP server that connects multiple OpenAI-compatible LLMs with shared tool access. Inspired by rubber duck debugging, it lets users discuss problems with different AI models, gather diverse insights — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: nikoloside/voice-notes
item.description: Local audio notes: record/import → local Whisper transcript → 3-layer LLM summary → cross-meeting knowledge graph. Self-hosted, no cloud. MCP server + shared graph viewer. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: menot-you/n-memory
item.description: Memory your agent can trust — every answer carries its source; when it doesn't know, it says so. Hermetic, local, MCP. — ⭐3, Rust

item.title: MaxFreedomPollard/engRAM
item.description: engRAM - superior agentic memory, encrypted at rest. Fully offline vector vault for AI agents (Hermes, Claude, OpenClaw). — ⭐3, Python

item.title: kaihendry/mcphints
item.description: Given an MCP server, shows the declared ToolAnnotations for security assessments — ⭐3, Go

item.title: livetennisapi/livetennisapi-mcp
item.description: MCP server for the Live Tennis API — give Claude, Cursor and other LLM agents real-time tennis scores, odds and model win-probability — ⭐271, JavaScript

item.title: risa-labs-inc/BossConsole
item.description: Open-source, multi-platform harness for AI agents — a native, multi-threaded operator's console (JVM, not Electron) to run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini or OpenCode with a real browser, terminal, editor, — ⭐156, Kotlin

item.title: MaxEllis/orcaslicer-mcp
item.description: OrcaSlicer MCP — drive OrcaSlicer from Claude or any MCP client: load models, tune settings, slice, analyze — ⭐14, Python

item.title: TipRanks/mcp
item.description: Official TipRanks MCP server — live analyst ratings, Smart Score, technicals, options, insider/hedge-fund activity, ETFs, and your TipRanks portfolios for AI agents. Hosted at mcp.tipranks.com/mcp/. — ⭐12, n/a

item.title: OATH-md/OathMCP
item.description: Agent-native MCP server for evidence-backed clinical calculators. — ⭐10, TypeScript
